_note: Schema reference only. Actual concept files are named [operation_id].json, generated by tools/init_state.py from its OPERATIONS table (owner-approved content, 2026-07-02). See core/operation_registry.md for the id list. New fields vs. the original schema: arc_introduced, name_attached/name_at_touch (D1/F6 1N model), touch_schedule/touch_target (D9 map-driven scheduling), prerequisite (D5, null until authored), preferred_context + contexts from the fixed enum (D4), canonical_problem_structure/canonical_correct_approach (assembler_template.spec.md Fix 2).
